moments.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Group Stage Action
moments.blurb: The expanded 48-team FIFA World Cup, jointly hosted by the USA, Canada, and Mexico, is in full swing with exciting group stage matches continuing this week.

angles.name: Global Footy Fever
angles.copy: The World Cup is ON! Who are you backing as the group stage battles continue across North America? Every game matters now. #FIFAWorldCup

angles.name: England Watch
angles.copy: England fans, get ready! The Three Lions are in World Cup action on June 27 against Panama. Will they dominate their group?

angles.name: International Flavour
angles.copy: Beyond England, there's so much to watch at the World Cup! Germany, Portugal, and the Netherlands are all in action this week. Who's impressing you most?

moments.title: Summer Solstice: Longest Day Approaches
moments.blurb: The Summer Solstice, marking the astronomical start of summer and the longest day of the year in the Northern Hemisphere, falls on Sunday, June 21st, at 9:24 AM BST.

angles.name: Embrace the Light
angles.copy: Get ready for maximum daylight! The Summer Solstice is this Sunday, June 21st. How are you making the most of the longest day of the year? #SummerSolstice

angles.name: Stonehenge Celebrations
angles.copy: Thousands will gather at Stonehenge to welcome the sunrise on Sunday for the Summer Solstice. A truly ancient tradition!

angles.name: Summer's Here
angles.copy: Officially summer from Sunday! Longer evenings, warmer days... what's top of your summer to-do list? #LongestDay

moments.title: Isle of Wight Festival Live This Weekend
moments.blurb: The iconic Isle of Wight Festival is in full swing from June 18-21, bringing a diverse lineup of rock, pop, and electronic artists to Seaclose Park.

angles.name: Festival Vibes
angles.copy: The Isle of Wight Festival is happening NOW! Who's there and what's been your highlight so far? Send us your best festival moments!

angles.name: Weekend Lineup
angles.copy: Still time to catch some incredible acts at the Isle of Wight Festival this weekend! Who's on your must-see list?

moments.title: TRNSMT Festival Takes Over Glasgow Green
moments.blurb: Scotland's premier music festival, TRNSMT, kicks off today, June 19, running through to June 21 at Glasgow Green, showcasing a huge lineup of artists.

angles.name: Glasgow's Music Weekend
angles.copy: TRNSMT is HERE! Glasgow Green is buzzing with live music from today until Sunday. Who are you buzzing to see? #TRNSMT

angles.name: Festival Buzz
angles.copy: From Glasgow to the world, TRNSMT is one of the UK's biggest festivals this weekend. What's your favourite festival memory?

moments.title: Parklife Festival Hits Manchester This Weekend
moments.blurb: Heaton Park in Manchester is set to host thousands of music fans for Parklife Festival on June 20-21, featuring a massive array of electronic and indie artists.

angles.name: Manchester's Party
angles.copy: Parklife is taking over Heaton Park this weekend! Get ready for two days of incredible music in Manchester. Who are you seeing?

angles.name: Dance Music Mecca
angles.copy: If you're into electronic and indie, Parklife is the place to be! Expect huge sets and unforgettable moments. #HeatonPark

moments.title: Wimbledon 2026: The Grand Slam Returns
moments.blurb: The world-renowned Wimbledon Championships are set to begin on Monday, June 29, bringing two weeks of top-tier tennis to the All England Club.

angles.name: Grass Court Season
angles.copy: The countdown to Wimbledon is on! Who are your picks to lift the trophies at the All England Club this year? #Wimbledon

angles.name: British Summer Tradition
angles.copy: Strawberries and cream are calling! Wimbledon is almost here, marking a true highlight of the British summer. #Tennis

moments.title: Summer Holidays Are Just Around The Corner!
moments.blurb: Many schools across the UK will soon be breaking up for the long summer holidays, with some areas starting in late June and most in mid-to-late July.

angles.name: Holiday Countdown
angles.copy: The summer holidays are almost here! Teachers, parents, and kids – what are your big plans for the long break? #SummerHolidays

angles.name: Local Breaks
angles.copy: Getting ready for the Welsh summer break? Many schools finish in early July. What local adventures are you planning?

moments.title: House of the Dragon Season 3 Premieres
moments.blurb: The highly anticipated third season of HBO's Game of Thrones prequel, House of the Dragon, is set to begin streaming on Monday, June 22.

angles.name: Return to Westeros
angles.copy: Fire and blood return to our screens! House of the Dragon Season 3 drops this Monday. Who's ready for more Targaryen drama? #HotDS3

angles.name: Fantasy Must-Watch
angles.copy: If you're looking for your next fantasy fix, the new season of House of the Dragon is a must-watch from Monday. Get those theories ready!

moments.title: The Bear Returns for Final Season
moments.blurb: The critically acclaimed culinary drama, The Bear, will serve up its fifth and final season, streaming from Friday, June 26.

angles.name: One Last Dish
angles.copy: Get ready for all the intensity and flavour one last time! The final season of The Bear arrives this Friday. Will Carmy get his Michelin star?

angles.name: Binge-Worthy Finale
angles.copy: Clear your weekend! The final season of The Bear is perfect for a binge-watch. What are your predictions for the crew?
